items.caption: An er diagram for a hospital, which is a graphical representation of the logical structure of a relational database. the diagram is divided into two main parts: the left side represents the clinical area, and the right side represents the ward area. the clinical area is further divided into patient, staff, and operation. the ward area is divided into team, patient, and staff. the diagram uses rectangles to represent tables, and lines to represent relationships between tables. the tables are labeled with their names, and the relationships are indicated by the crow's foot notation. the diagram also includes a legend explaining the symbols used.
